stations.name: Morningside railway station
stations.walk_minutes_note: Closest station for southern Hawthorne streets.

ferry.note: Direct CityCat service to the CBD, South Bank, and UQ. The Hawthorne ferry stop is one of the most-used in inner east Brisbane.

buses.note: Bus routes serve Hawthorne via Hawthorne Road, Riding Road, and Lytton Road.

driving.motorway_access: Story Bridge for the CBD. Gateway Motorway via Cannon Hill or Morningside interchanges.
driving.approx_cbd_minutes_offpeak_note: Approximately 8 to 12 minutes to Brisbane CBD off-peak via the Story Bridge.

connections: Brisbane Riverwalk and the Hawthorne riverside path
Hawthorne Road is walkable to the Garage precinct from most streets

primary_state.name: Hawthorne State School (Bulimba SS catchment overlap)
primary_state.note: Many Hawthorne addresses fall within the Bulimba State School catchment. Verify for any specific street.

lifestyle.shops_dining_note: The Hawthorne Garage precinct is the suburb's cafe and dining cluster. Oxford Street in Bulimba is a five to seven minute walk for the larger village strip experience. Daily groceries through Bulimba Plaza or the Cannon Hill K-Mart Plaza.
lifestyle.river_access: Brisbane River frontage and ferry access at Hawthorne Ferry Terminal.

pockets.name: Riverside
pockets.character: Streets within walking distance of the river and the ferry. Heritage queenslanders, premium character stock, premium family-home market.

pockets.name: Garage precinct
pockets.character: Streets around the Hawthorne Garage cafe cluster. Mix of character homes, contemporary builds, and townhouses. Walkability is the proposition.

pockets.name: Bulimba boundary
pockets.character: Streets along the suburb boundary with Bulimba. Similar character, often debated as Bulimba or Hawthorne by buyers depending on which side of the boundary the address sits.

buyer_profile.note: Families targeting the Bulimba State School catchment overlap and the Hawthorne lifestyle. The largest segment in the suburb.
Buyers moving up from Norman Park, Morningside, or Coorparoo for river access and ferry convenience.
Long-term inner-east owners moving from larger family homes to townhouses or smaller character homes to stay in the area.

verify_flags: Bulimba State School catchment boundary for any given Hawthorne street
Secondary catchment for any specific address
